name: Redline Royale
short_description: A Fueled Up Free-For-All! Redline Royale is an action-packed multiplayer game where players must take down opponents and earn trophies with a team of custom vehicles and a wild arsenal of weapons and boosters. Drop into a world of destruction and join the mayhem!
detailed_description:
Overview

Welcome to the adrenaline-fueled world of Redline Royale: a PvP battle royale game that challenges players to get behind the wheel and outpace, outwit, and outlast their opponents. The goal? Take down vehicles, outrace the storms and earn trophies through speed, precision, and a uniquely destructive arsenal.

Key Features


Buckle up for mayhem!
- Experiment with a plethora of wild weapons and exciting boosters to discover endless possibilities for destruction.

Get behind the wheel!
- Build your team with over 20 customizable vehicles! From sleek sports cars to rugged off-roaders, there's a ride for every style and strategy.

Drop into a world of destruction!
- Whether it's the torched terrain of Blistering Bluffs or the sprawling cityscape of Bustling Bay, explore each battleground and find new paths for mayhem!
- Preset drop zones eliminate random spawning!
- Don’t forget the upgrades!
- Offensive and defensive enhancements are available to give your vehicle an extra edge in the heat of battle. Earn achievements to get these perks and conquer daily quests to earn even more!
- Team up with friends or challenge new rivals online!
- Every victory earns you trophies and propels you up the leaderboards.
- Show off your victory dance!
- Unlock an array of cool emotes and stylish skins for your driver, adding a personal touch to your gaming experience.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain
